title: Waifu Mod
description: Adds Mobs that help and protect you and a new Ore
body:
With this Mod you'll be able to find new mobs in the world that will accompany you and fight alongside you.When finding one you can press right click to befriend them.Once befriended they will have their own inventory where you can store Items and give them Armor and weapons.
![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ddb6078ce7d90cbb320f0d28c17a1dc2f1081ab.png)
 ![Waifus with Equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/659e0503d3f0d8ed916dea04195adc5dfb8923f6.png)



 

**Behaviour Settings**

After befriending them you can press "V" to open a new Gui.With this you will be able to change the behavior of your Waifu by clicking on the different Symbols.

 ![Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac8657eb366f90bfd019c02397d195cacf8373bb.png)

(From left to right)

Passive:

Waifus wont attack any mob.

 

Neutral:

Waifus will only attack mobs if they or you have been attacked or you attack something.


Aggressive:

Waifus will attack any mob that is nearby.

 

Stay close:

Waifus will constantly follow you.

 

Wander:

Resets "Stay Close".

 


**Waifuium**

A new Radioactive Ore that is capable of summoning Waifus.With this Ore you can craft Tools and Armor that poison mobs when hit.You will need a Diamond Pickaxe to mine this Ore.

 ![Waifuium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/767e3e10ed0546bd3eea7eb57f5664ce5a950ca0.png)



 

**Spawning**

Waifus will spawn Randomly in the world after some time.Spawn distance and time can be changed in the config

Alternatively you can summon them with Waifuium. In order to do so you need to craft Waifuium blocks from the ore and place said blocks on the ground in a "+" formation.Then place the last Waifuium block on top of the center block to spawn a Waifu.You need 5 Waifuium Blocks for the foundation and 1 Waifuium block for summoning.

 
**Waifu features**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Dual wield:

When giving a Waifu a weapon in both hands they will attack twice as fast but deal slightly less damage per hit.They will also alternate Weapons after each hit.

Shield:

If Waifus have a shield in their Offhand they will have a chance to block an incoming attack.

Bow and Arrow:

When equiping a Waifu with a Bow and  Arrows it will try to keep its distance while firing Arrows.


Healing:

Waifus can Eat food which will heal them over time.Or you can place a bed next to yours.If you sleep your waifu will sleep next to you.After sleeping the night away they will heal a little bit of health.

AI:

When fighting a mob, Waifus will try to move backwards if the mob gets too close.
If Waifus fight Players they will occasionally strafe.

Friends:

Waifus can become friends with each other when both are set to stay and are close enough to each other.After some time they will have a chance to befriend each other.This feature Currently has no use except when Waifus are friends and one happens to die the other one will start to cry.

</details>



 
**Credits**

This Mod was heavily inspired by the "Dream waifu mod" by Cromtakun for 1.16 ([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dream-waifu-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dream-waifu-mod))
